FI Token Migration
Active
Description
This platform is designed for the seamless transition from FI tokens to the new Pairs tokens. By participating in this swap, you will exchange your existing FI tokens for Pairs tokens, which will be integral to accessing and utilizing the enhanced services and features of the Pairs ecosystem.
